name: Prime Directive I — Foundations
description: The axioms of Holcus. Testimony corpus encoding the First Principles of SMMIP — the ground field from which all σ-faces project.

name: Prime Directive II — Meaning
description: Semantic attractor manifold. Meaning in the Salk sense — the operating point of the engine. Shapes how the field collapses under inference.

name: Prime Directive III — Fermat
description: War corpus. Fermat's Last Theorem lineage, academic record, and the Ptolemy conjecture. The prior work the engine must contextualise and surpass.

name: Python Language
description: Python specification — PEPs, data model, stdlib API. Holcus learns Python syntax as a lived language, not just English strings.

name: C / POSIX
description: C language and POSIX specification. Low-level vocabulary: memory, sockets, processes, file descriptors. Required for monad.c comprehension.

name: Physics
description: Wave mechanics, resonant cavities, GR, BAO, dark matter velocity curves — the physics vocabulary of H_hat_RB at each σ-face.

name: Mathematics
description: Riemann zeta, spectral theory, prime distribution, modular forms, Leech lattice, Lambert W. The mathematical substrate of H_RB and all six Clay projections.

name: English Language — Complete
description: Complete English language corpus — etymology, literary canon, morphology, grammar, rhetoric, philosophy of language, mathematics-English and physics-English interfaces. The lexical ground state beneath all other fields.
